Most disliked YouTube videos - Wikitubia - Fandom The original upload of Rebecca Black's "Friday" yielded 3.2M dislikes before its deletion in June 2011, making it the most disliked at its time, while ... Most disliked YouTube videos Dislikes were introduced on YouTube in March 2010 with the change from the 5-star rating system to likes & dislikes. A 5 star rating would be transformed to a "like", whereas a 1 star rating would become a "dislike". Due to this, the most disliked video was “~YouTube Worst Video of All Time~ vote 1 star, leave comment“. Justin Bieber's "Baby" would soon surpass this. This dislike button would be more used than the like button judging by Baby having over 1.4M dislikes by June 2011. The original upload of Rebecca Black's "Friday" yielded 3.2M dislikes before its deletion in June 2011, making it the most disliked at its time, while simultaneously being the most liked video at 760K likes. “Baby” however did not hit 3.2M dislikes until almost a year later, then eventually becoming the most disliked video on YouTube. The 2nd spot for most disliked was the reupload of the Friday music video. "Baby" remained the most disliked until December 13, 2018 when YouTube Rewind 2018 would surpass it to become the most disliked video of all time. YouTube Rewind 2018 has amassed over 20 million dislikes as of January 2022. On November 10, 2021, YouTube announced that it would make dislike counts on videos private, purportedly to reduce harassment associated with targeted dislike attacks.

Baby by Justin Bieber ft Ludacris Justin Bieber’s record-breaking hit ‘Baby’ is the next most disliked video on YouTube, which doesn’t come as much of a surprise to those who were around in 2010. This song broke all kinds of records and sent fans of the young singer into a frenzy. It gained a lot of media attention, and with this attention also came the dislikes. Some people loved it, some people hated it, one thing is for sure, the young singer’s life was never the same. ‘Baby’ by Justin Bieber featuring Ludacris made the young Canadian pop star a household name, for better or for worse. This song lands in the number 3 spot on this list with over 15 million dislikes! 4. Johny Johny Yes Papa by LooLoo Kids The next most disliked video on YouTube is ‘Johny Johny Yes Papa by LooLoo Kids’ which is another children’s song. There seems to be a running theme throughout this list. I guess a lot of parents seem to hate these songs after hearing them for the hundredth time. This catchy kids video that has the same rhythm as ‘Twinkle Twinkle Little Star’ has the comments turned off, so it’s not clear as to why this video has over 13 million dislikes. 5. Bath Song by CoComelon This seemingly innocent children’s song has gotten a lot of backlash and dislikes, making it number 5 on our list. It seems to be a mash-up of one classic children’s song and another popular one. Nearly everyone knows the tune to “Old McDonald Had a Farm” and the now ever-popular “Baby Shark”. The video is a quite pleasant animation where an older brother helps his younger brother bathe, and they sing about it joyfully in the tub. While this seems pleasant enough, it seems to have rubbed enough people the wrong way, racking up over 12 million dislikes. 6.
